description_long: This is a sleek blue sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a convertible roof, featuring two seats and a streamlined body. The car has a wide front grille, aggressive headlights, and sculpted air vents on the sides, enhancing its sporty appearance. The wheels are large, black, and feature a five-spoke design, contributing to its performance-oriented look. The interior is visible from the side, showing a modern dashboard and steering wheel, with bucket-style seats for driver and passenger. The rear of the car is compact, with dual exhausts and subtle taillights integrated into the bodywork. The overall design emphasizes speed, agility, and luxury, making it suitable for urban streets and upscale neighborhoods.
description: A blue convertible sports car with a low, aerodynamic body, black five-spoke wheels, and a modern two-seat interior. Its design features aggressive vents, a wide grille, and dual rear exhausts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, aggressive headlights, and sculpted hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the convertible roof, visible interior, and side air vents.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the compact back, dual exhausts, and subtle taillights.
description_view_3: Right side view with clear visibility of the interior, side vents, and black wheels.
